parsed.production_notes: 2D motion graphics and UI animation. No human actors or camera footage present.

characters.appearance: Stylized green owl. Large white eyes with black pupils and a yellow beak. Wears round black glasses.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid white background. A stylized green owl with large eyes and round black glasses pops up from the bottom edge. The owl remains stationary at the bottom center, looking forward.

scenes.visual_description: A digital quiz interface on a white background. A progress bar sits at the top. Text asks if a word is real, and a cursor clicks the 'Yes' button. Character A pops up from the bottom with a speech bubble.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: If you got it right, then you are ready to take the DET. [If you got it right, then you are ready to take the DET.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Is this a real English word? PREVALENT. Yes. No. If you got it right then you are ready to take the DET!

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, bright green background. No characters or props are visible.

scenes.visual_description: A solid green background displays a white logo. Below the logo, white promotional text appears.
scenes.on_screen_text: duolingo english test. Take unlimited free practice tests
